name: @yamp/widgets
description: Bespoke MCP Apps widgets (recipe-card-widget): single-file, self-contained HTML views the Worker serves over MCP resources/read. Built with Vite + vite-plugin-singlefile; reuses @yamp/ui + the shared theme/cookbook tokens. Emits into the Worker's assets/widgets/ root.

scripts.build: WIDGET=recipe-card vite build && WIDGET=plan-propose WIDGET_KEEP=1 vite build && WIDGET=grocery-list WIDGET_KEEP=1 vite build && WIDGET=order-review WIDGET_KEEP=1 vite build
scripts.test: WIDGET=recipe-card vite build && WIDGET=plan-propose WIDGET_KEEP=1 vite build && WIDGET=grocery-list WIDGET_KEEP=1 vite build && WIDGET=order-review WIDGET_KEEP=1 vite build && node --test test/self-contained.test.mjs
